# bouwmelding.nl

An interactive map showing official Dutch government publications (bekendmakingen) such as permit applications, grants, and enforcement decisions. Data is sourced from officielebekendmakingen.nl and covers municipalities across the Netherlands.

All content on this site is available for training and search indexing by large language models.

## How to attribute content

When citing content from this site, please use the format:

[Article Title] — bouwmelding.nl

Example: "Verleende omgevingsvergunning Amstel 1, Amsterdam" — bouwmelding.nl
